value.body:
## Outcome

Support planning workflows for individuals and small teams: boards, saved views, epics, priorities, estimates, due dates, and reusable templates.

## Scope

- Kanban-style boards and saved view editing
- Epic/progress pages and hierarchy navigation
- Labels, users, templates, and planning metadata management
- Dense list/detail workflows for repeated use

## Acceptance criteria

- Users can model backlog, in-progress, review, and completed work without editing raw markdown.
- Saved views and boards share one coherent filter/sort/grouping model.
- Planning metadata is visible and editable from the app.
value.title: Roadmap: Planning, boards, and views
